commentaries.author: Hilary of Arles
commentaries.content: It is a sin to show any class distinction among persons, for the law says: "You shall not be partial in judgment, you shall hear the small and the great alike.(Deut 1:17)" Jesus confirmed this when he said: "Do not judge by appearances, but judge with right judgment.(Jn 7:24)"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
